name: Teddy Pendergrass
abstract: Theodore DeReese Pendergrass (March 26, 1950 – January 13, 2010) was an American soul and R&B singer and songwriter. He was born in Kingstree, South Carolina.

about_quotes.speaker: Larry Gold
about_quotes.evidence: So you know Teddy Pendergrass playing the White House? You know? I mean singing at the White House? That's a little weird you know, in the '70s.
about_quotes.doc_title: Larry Gold interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 18, 2025
